name: clarinator
description: Interactive clarify-before-you-code gate: serve a branching decision tree (or a plan) in the browser, block the agent on one structured submit, print the result to stdout. Run via `bunx github:est7/clarinator`.
author: est7

scripts.build:bin: bun run build && bun build --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 bin/clarinator.ts --outfile dist/clarinator-darwin-arm64
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run test:server

comment: react/react-dom/marked are devDependencies: the CLI/server never import them; they are only needed to build dist/app.html, which is committed. This keeps `bunx github:est7/clarinator` a zero-dependency install at consume time.
